messages.content: You are a support ticket classifier. Classify the ticket into exactly one category: bug, feature, billing, question, or other. Reply with a single word — the category name.

Subject: Add bulk rename functionality to file management in project workspace

When working on large design projects, I frequently need to rename dozens of assets at once to match a new naming convention, but currently I have to do each file one by one which is incredibly time-consuming. It would be a huge productivity boost if you could add a bulk rename feature — similar to what tools like Adobe Bridge offer — where I can select multiple files and apply a pattern or find-and-replace rule across all of them at once. Even a simple sequential numbering option (e.g., 'banner_v1', 'banner_v2', etc.) would save me and my team hours every week. Happy to participate in any beta testing if this gets prioritized!
feature
You are a support ticket classifier. Classify the ticket into exactly one category: bug, feature, billing, question, or other. Reply with a single word — the category name.

Subject: Partnership Opportunity – Accessibility Tools Integration

Hi there, I'm the founder of a small nonprofit called OpenAccess that develops screen reader plugins and keyboard navigation tools for people with visual and motor impairments. We've been using your platform internally and think there's a genuinely exciting opportunity to integrate our tools directly into your product to better serve users with disabilities. I'd love to connect with whoever handles partnership or business development discussions to explore what this could look like. Please feel free to reach out at partnerships@openaccessorg.org or I'm happy to schedule a call at your convenience.
other

Subject: Charged for annual plan but I selected monthly

When I signed up last week, I specifically chose the monthly billing option at $19/month, but my credit card was charged $204 for what appears to be an annual subscription. I never agreed to an annual commitment and I can't find anywhere in my account settings to confirm which plan I'm actually on. Could you please correct this to a monthly plan and refund the difference? I'd like to keep using the service, just not locked into a full year.
billing

Subject: Invoice PDF export completely broken after yesterday's update

Ever since your system pushed an automatic update last night, every single time I try to export an invoice as a PDF I get a white blank file with nothing on it — no data, no logo, just empty pages. I've tried it on three different invoices, two different browsers, and even had my colleague test it on her machine and it's the same result for everyone. This is a serious problem because I have invoices due to clients TODAY and I cannot send them blank PDFs. Please fix this immediately or at least roll back whatever you changed, because this was working perfectly fine before your update.
bug

Subject: Allow bulk reassignment of tasks when removing a team member

When we offboard an employee and remove them from our workspace, we currently have to go through every single open task one by one to reassign it to someone else — which is incredibly tedious for larger teams. It would be a huge time-saver if, upon deactivating or removing a user, the system prompted us to bulk reassign all of their open tasks to another team member in a single step. Even a simple dropdown asking 'Reassign all open tasks to:' before confirming the removal would make this process so much smoother. This comes up for us almost every time someone leaves the company and it's easily the most painful part of our offboarding workflow.
feature

Subject: Allow bulk renaming of files in project library

We manage hundreds of asset files across multiple campaigns and renaming them one at a time is extremely time-consuming. It would be a huge productivity boost if we could select multiple files in the project library and apply a batch rename with support for numbering sequences or find-and-replace patterns. Other tools like Lightroom and Bridge handle this really well and it's become something our team expects as a baseline feature. Even a basic version of this would save us hours every week.

Subject: How do I restrict which team members can approve pull requests?

We have a few junior developers on our team and I want to make sure only senior engineers can approve and merge pull requests into our main branch. I've looked through the repository settings but I'm not sure if this is controlled through branch protection rules, team permissions, or something else entirely. Can you walk me through the correct way to set this up so that approvals from certain users are required before a merge is allowed?

Subject: Charged for annual plan but signed up for monthly

I signed up for the monthly Pro plan last Tuesday, but my credit card was charged $348.00, which appears to be the annual rate rather than the $29/month I selected. I never chose an annual subscription and did not see any indication during checkout that I was committing to a full year upfront. I would like this corrected immediately — either refund the difference and keep me on a monthly cycle, or cancel the subscription entirely if that's easier. Please advise on the fastest way to resolve this.
billing
